_fixture_note: Real output from 2026-07-16 against RAW.CLUSTER_TEST_COMPLEX (30M rows, 4.4GB, no clustering key) -- built with 8 REGION-filter queries and 4 CUSTOMER_SEGMENT-filter queries (both columns randomly scattered) plus 3 well-pruning EVENT_TIME queries. Harder than the single-candidate case: the skill had to correctly RANK two real competing candidates by frequency, not just detect one problem column. REGION (8 mentions) correctly ranked above CUSTOMER_SEGMENT (4 mentions); EVENT_TIME correctly excluded entirely.
heuristic_note: Candidate columns are found via text-matching real column names against the non-SELECT-list portion of poorly-pruned queries -- not a SQL parser. It can miss a real filter written unusually, and can't fully rule out a same-named column from a different, joined table.

advisory.detail: No clustering key currently defined. 12 of 16 queries in the window scanned more than 50% of the table's partitions, and REGION was the most frequent real column in their filter/join text.
